title: Ouratea dupuisii

This plant belongs to the genus Ouratea, which consists of approximately 40 species of flowering plants. Ouratea dupuisii is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, where it grows in the understory of humid forests. intro: Ouratea dupuisii, also known as Patawa, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, belonging to the family Ochnaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic activities, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin infections.
